peaks.description: k+s4 Berger Mars obliquity sub-peak OR k−g3 Earth axial-apsidal beat (~39.5 kyr); pre-MPT may include Mars ICRF (8H/69 ±1)
2|s4| Mars nodal harmonic (~36.7 kyr) OR g3−s4 Earth-Mars apsidal-nodal beat
g4−s3 Mars apsidal − Earth nodal beat (~35.3 kyr)

Obliquity-band arithmetic-mean cycle length (~40.5 kyr) — Jensen's inequality vs k+s3 Fourier centroid (doc 17 §6.6). At T<3000 kyr Fourier resolution cannot separate n=65/66/67, and amplitude piles at the cycle-counting mean position.
